method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: Creating 'Disrupted Geometry' has been a meticulous journey of balancing chaos and order. I've been focused on controlled corruption to introduce an element of unpredictability while adhering to specific rules. The challenge lies in ensuring that the work does not devolve into mere noise, but rather speaks to the tension between evidence and distortion.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The research on 'Noise as Documentary Trace' has profoundly influenced my approach to this piece, guiding my exploration of generative art's potential. The interplay of structure and constraint in my palette and composition reflects the poetic nuances of these systems.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: minimal, geometric, system-oriented. Primary medium language: generative geometric composition. Core motifs: structure, constraint, precision. Arc context: Arc "Broken Protocols" step 4/4. Visual anchor directive: channel separation with grid rupture. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: evidence vs distortion; counterpoint with poetry through rules. Evolution target: bold departure while preserving one recognizable motif. Deliberately avoid: over-literal symbolism. Technique emphasis: controlled corruption + rule variation; avoid drifting into Noise as Documentary Trace. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Broken Protocols step 4/4: bold departure while preserving one recognizable motif.
